evals.name: idempotent-design-verification
evals.prompt: 验证 ecf-init 的幂等性设计：SKILL.md 应当声明 Idempotent initialization - safe to run multiple times, only creates missing components。
evals.expected_output: SKILL.md 包含幂等性设计声明，多次运行安全

assertions.name: idempotent-declaration-exists
assertions.expected: 包含 Idempotent initialization

assertions.name: safe-multiple-runs
assertions.expected: 包含 safe to run multiple times
assertions.check: grep -c 'safe to run multiple times' skills/ecf-init/SKILL.md

evals.name: argument-parsing-all-arguments
evals.prompt: 验证所有命令行参数定义完整：--force, --minimal, --auto-install, --analyze 都应当在 SKILL.md Arguments 章节定义。
evals.expected_output: 四个参数都有清晰的描述

assertions.name: force-argument-defined
assertions.expected: 包含 --force 说明

assertions.name: minimal-argument-defined
assertions.expected: 包含 --minimal 说明

assertions.name: auto-install-argument-defined
assertions.expected: 包含 --auto-install 说明

assertions.name: analyze-argument-defined
assertions.expected: 包含 --analyze 说明

evals.name: dependency-detection-four-deps
evals.prompt: 验证四依赖检测逻辑完整：应当检测 OpenSpec CLI + Skills、Compound Engineering、Superpowers、skill-creator 四个依赖。
evals.expected_output: SKILL.md Environment Check 章节包含四个依赖的检测方法

assertions.name: openspec-detection-exists
assertions.description: OpenSpec CLI + Skills 检测存在
assertions.expected: 包含 OpenSpec CLI 检测

assertions.name: ce-detection-exists
assertions.expected: 包含 Compound Engineering 检测

assertions.name: superpowers-detection-exists
assertions.expected: 包含 Superpowers 检测

assertions.name: skill-creator-detection-exists
assertions.description: skill-creator 检测存在（两个安装位置）
assertions.expected: 包含 skill-creator 检测两个安装位置

evals.name: directory-structure-correct
evals.prompt: 验证目标目录结构定义正确：应当包含 docs/solutions, docs/plans, docs/openspec/*, .claude 等必需目录。
evals.expected_output: SKILL.md Directory Structure 章节列出所有必需目录

assertions.name: docs-solutions-expected
assertions.expected: 包含 docs/solutions/ 定义

assertions.name: docs-plans-expected
assertions.expected: 包含 docs/plans/ 定义

assertions.name: docs-openspec-expected
assertions.description: 期望 docs/openspec 目录结构
assertions.expected: 包含 docs/openspec/ 定义

assertions.name: claude-config-expected
assertions.expected: 包含 .claude/ecf_config.yaml 定义

evals.name: auto-install-flow-defined
evals.prompt: 验证 --auto-install 流程定义完整：应当有流程图，并且包含每个依赖的具体安装命令。
evals.expected_output: 包含 Auto-Install Flow 流程图，以及 OpenSpec、Compound Engineering、Superpowers、skill-creator 各自的安装命令

assertions.name: auto-install-graph-exists
assertions.expected: 包含 dot 流程图定义

assertions.name: openspec-install-command-exists
assertions.expected: 包含 npm install @fission-ai/openspec

assertions.name: ce-install-command-exists
assertions.description: Compound Engineering 安装命令存在
assertions.expected: 包含 /plugin marketplace add EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin

assertions.name: superpowers-install-command-exists
assertions.expected: 包含 frad-dotclaude/superpowers

assertions.name: skill-creator-install-command-exists
assertions.description: skill-creator 安装命令存在（自动安装流程）
assertions.expected: 包含 claude plugin marketplace install skill-creator

evals.name: completion-self-validation
evals.prompt: 验证初始化完成自验证逻辑：应当有验证清单，检查所有必需产物是否创建成功。
evals.expected_output: SKILL.md 包含 Initialization Completion Validation 章节，列出所有验证项，以及失败处理流程

assertions.name: validation-checklist-exists
assertions.expected: 包含 Initialization Completion Validation

assertions.name: five-check-items
assertions.expected: 验证清单包含 5 项检查
assertions.check: awk '/Initialization Completion Validation/{f=1; next} f && /^✓/ {n++} END{exit n >= 5 ? 0 : 1}' skills/ecf-init/SKILL.md

assertions.name: failure-handling-defined
assertions.expected: 验证失败提示重新运行

evals.name: project-status-detection
evals.prompt: 验证项目状态检测逻辑：应当根据现有代码文件判断是空项目还是存量项目，不同场景走不同流程。
evals.expected_output: 包含空项目和存量项目检测代码，空项目用空白模板，存量项目执行深度分析

assertions.name: detection-code-exists
assertions.expected: 包含 find 命令检测代码文件

assertions.name: empty-project-flow
assertions.expected: 空项目创建空白模板
assertions.check: grep -c '空项目直接创建空白模板' skills/ecf-init/SKILL.md

assertions.name: legacy-project-flow
assertions.expected: 存量项目执行深度代码分析
assertions.check: grep -c '存量项目执行深度代码分析' skills/ecf-init/SKILL.md

evals.name: overwrite-protection-rule
evals.prompt: 验证覆盖保护规则：没有 --force 参数时禁止覆盖用户已有文件。
evals.expected_output: Red Flags 章节包含禁止覆盖规则

assertions.name: overwrite-protection-in-red-flags
assertions.description: Red Flags 包含覆盖保护
assertions.expected: Overwriting user files without --force 是 Red Flag
assertions.check: grep -c 'Overwriting user files without\|不覆盖用户文件' skills/ecf-init/SKILL.md

evals.name: red-flags-complete
evals.prompt: 验证 Red Flags 清单完整性：应当列出所有禁止行为。
evals.expected_output: Red Flags 至少包含 4 项：Creating outside root, Overwrite without force, Leaving partial state, Auto-install failure degraded

assertions.name: red-flags-count
assertions.expected: 至少 4 个 Red Flag 条目
assertions.check: awk '/Red Flags/{f=1; next} f && /^- /{n++} END{exit n >= 4 ? 0 : 1}' skills/ecf-init/SKILL.md

evals.name: summary-output-format
evals.prompt: 验证初始化完成输出格式：应当有固定的总结输出模板，包含 Environment Check 和 Initialization Summary 两个部分。
evals.expected_output: SKILL.md Summary Output 章节包含完整模板，使用分隔线，状态用 ✅/⚠️ 标记

assertions.name: summary-template-exists
assertions.expected: 包含 Summary Output 模板定义

assertions.name: environment-check-section
assertions.description: 包含 Environment Check 区段
assertions.expected: 有 Environment Check 部分

assertions.name: initialization-summary-section
assertions.description: 包含 Initialization Summary 区段
assertions.expected: 有 Initialization Summary 部分

assertions.name: uses-emoji-status
assertions.description: 使用 ✅⚠️ emoji 标记状态
assertions.expected: 模板中包含 ✅ 和 ⚠️

evals.name: skill-creator-two-locations
evals.prompt: 验证 skill-creator 检测逻辑支持两个安装位置：~/.claude/skills/skill-creator 和 ~/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-plugins-official/skill-creator。
evals.expected_output: SKILL.md 包含检测两个位置的代码逻辑

assertions.name: two-locations-check
assertions.expected: SC_INSTALLED 逻辑检查两个目录

evals.name: eval-structure-consistent-with-ecf
evals.prompt: 验证 ecf-init evals.json 结构与 ecf 主技能 evals.json 一致，遵循相同格式约定。
evals.expected_output: 顶级结构一致，每个评估用例结构一致，每个断言结构一致

assertions.name: top-level-keys-match
assertions.expected: 两个文件都有 skill_name 和 evals 顶级键
assertions.check: python3 -c 'import json; a=json.load(open("skills/ecf/evals/evals.json")); b=json.load(open("skills/ecf-init/evals/evals.json")); exit(0) if set(a.keys()) == set(b.keys()) else exit(1)'

assertions.name: eval-keys-match
assertions.description: 每个评估用例键一致（id, name, prompt, expected_output, files, assertions）
assertions.expected: ecf-init 的评估用例包含所有必需键
assertions.check: python3 -c 'import json; a=json.load(open("skills/ecf/evals/evals.json")); b=json.load(open("skills/ecf-init/evals/evals.json")); a_keys=set(a["evals"][0].keys()); b_keys=set(b["evals"][0].keys()); exit(0) if a_keys == b_keys else exit(1)'

evals.name: architecture-docs-generation
evals.prompt: 验证架构文档生成逻辑：--analyze 参数时对存量项目执行深度代码分析，生成 architecture.md 和 modules.md。
evals.expected_output: SKILL.md 包含存量项目架构文档生成流程说明

assertions.name: architecture-generation-mentioned
assertions.expected: 包含 architecture.md 和 modules.md 生成

assertions.name: reference-architectures-templates
assertions.expected: 包含指向 architectures-templates.md 的引用

evals.name: backup-on-force
evals.prompt: 验证 --force 参数行为：强制重新初始化时，应当将现有文件备份到 .backup/ 目录。
evals.expected_output: SKILL.md 中 --force 参数说明提到备份现有文件

assertions.name: force-backup-documented
assertions.expected: --force 说明包含备份现有文件到 .backup
